header.title: Shipping & delivery
header.description: EU-first fulfillment from the Netherlands with tracked delivery across member states and worldwide options.

features.cutoffDesc: Orders placed before noon Central European Time, Monday–Friday, are dispatched the same business day.
features.trackedDesc: Every shipment is fully tracked from our laboratory to your facility.
features.packagingDesc: Items are vacuum-sealed and shipped in plain, unmarked packaging suitable for research facilities.

regions.title: EU & international reach
regions.euDesc: Standard EU shipping: 3–7 business days. Free shipping on qualifying orders over €500 (subtotal).
regions.worldDesc: Non-EU destinations: 5–14 business days depending on customs and regional carriers.
regions.ukDesc: Tracked UK options remain available at checkout when United Kingdom is selected as the destination.

responsibility.body: Buyers are responsible for ensuring products comply with local import laws. Customs duties, VAT, and regional taxes may apply and are the purchaser's responsibility where not collected at checkout.
responsibility.disclaimer: Research-use only. Not for human or veterinary consumption.
